headline: L3Harris Powers First Crewed Mission Around the Moon in 50 Years
summary: KENNEDY SPACE CENTER, Fla., April 02, 2026--L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) has successfully powered the historic launch of the Artemis II mission, providing propulsion and avionics for the first crewed journey toward the moon in more than 50 years.

content.title: L3Harris Powers First Crewed Mission Around the Moon in 50 Years
content.summary: KENNEDY SPACE CENTER, Fla., April 02, 2026--L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) has successfully powered the historic launch of the Artemis II mission, providing propulsion and avionics for the first crewed journey toward the moon in more than 50 years.

thumbnail.caption: L3Harris has successfully powered the historic launch of the Artemis II mission, providing propulsion and avionics.

headline: L3Harris Selects Mercury To Provide Solid-State Data Recorders for SDA’s Tranche 3 Tracking Layer Satellites
summary: Tranche 3 Tracking Layer L3Harris technology for the SDA Tranche 3 Tracking Layer program will provide infrared sensing, advanced on-orbit data processing and real-time detection of advanced hypersonic and ballistic missile threats. ANDOVER, Mass., April 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Mercury Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRCY, www.mrcy.com), a global technology company that delivers mission-critical processing to the edge, today announced it was awarded a contract from L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX)

headline: Is Artemis II Mission Role Altering The Investment Case For L3Harris Technologies (LHX)?
summary: L3Harris Technologies recently powered NASA’s historic Artemis II launch, supplying propulsion, avionics, in‑space thrusters and astronaut communications for the first crewed lunar journey in more than 50 years. This extensive role across more than 100 mission elements underscores L3Harris’s breadth in critical space hardware and systems integration for high‑stakes government programs. Next, we’ll explore how L3Harris’s central role in Artemis II could influence its investment narrative...
